'''Hewat''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|female]] who served as an [[Imperial Office of Customs/Legends|Imperial Customs]] agent during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. She was committed to exposing the [[Rybet/Legends|Rybet]] [[Moruth Doole]], administrator of the [[Spice mines of Kessel/Legends|spice mines]] of [[Kessel/Legends|Kessel]], as the head of an illegal [[Spice/Legends|spice]] distribution network. Her daughter, [[Kora]], lived on [[Yityl]].
